image:image.image:title: Logo Consultoria Exato - Soluções Ocupacionais e Ambientais
image:image.image:caption: Logo da Consultoria Exato, empresa especializada em EHS e Radioproteção

image:image.image:title: Paulo Cassim - Consultor EHS com 28 anos de experiência
image:image.image:caption: Paulo Cassim, fundador da Consultoria Exato, especialista em Segurança do Trabalho, Meio Ambiente e Radioproteção

image:image.image:title: Bandeira do Brasil - Acesso versão em Português
image:image.image:caption: Idioma: Português Brasileiro

image:image.image:title: Bandeira dos EUA - Acesso versão em Inglês
image:image.image:caption: Language: English

image:image.image:title: Ícone Segurança do Trabalho
image:image.image:caption: Ícone representando serviços de Consultoria em Segurança do Trabalho e Conformidade com Normas Regulamentadoras

image:image.image:title: Ícone Meio Ambiente
image:image.image:caption: Ícone representando serviços de Gestão Ambiental e Licenciamentos CETESB

image:image.image:title: Ícone Radioproteção
image:image.image:caption: Ícone representando serviços de Supervisão de Radioproteção para Medidores Nucleares em Indústrias

image:image.image:title: Avaliações de Meio Ambiente
image:image.image:caption: Serviço de avaliações em loco e documentais de Meio Ambiente, Consultoria Exato

image:image.image:title: Auditorias em Segurança do Trabalho
image:image.image:caption: Verificação do atendimento legal com Normas Regulamentadoras (NR) e normas internas de segurança

image:image.image:title: Investigação de Acidentes Ambientais
image:image.image:caption: Investigação in loco sobre Acidentes Ambientais com análise de causas e recomendações

image:image.image:title: Investigação de Acidentes do Trabalho
image:image.image:caption: Reconstrução, avaliação, busca de causas raiz e plano de ação para acidentes ocupacionais

image:image.image:title: Espaços Confinados - NR 33
image:image.image:caption: Procedimentos, treinamento, auditoria relacionados a espaços confinados conforme NR-33

image:image.image:title: Segurança para Equipamentos Motorizados
image:image.image:caption: Elaboração de treinamentos e procedimentos para segurança em equipamentos motorizados

image:image.image:title: NR-35 Trabalho em Altura - Proteção contra Quedas
image:image.image:caption: Consultoria em trabalho em altura e proteção contra quedas conforme Norma Regulamentadora NR-35

image:image.image:title: Segurança para Prestadores de Serviços
image:image.image:caption: Elaboração de procedimentos, critérios de admissão, auditorias periódicas e treinamentos para prestadores

image:image.image:title: Gestão de Bloqueio de Energias Perigosas - Lockout Tagout
image:image.image:caption: Bloqueio e gerenciamento de energias perigosas para máquinas e equipamentos (LOTO)

image:image.image:title: Supervisão de Radioproteção Industrial
image:image.image:caption: Atendimento às normas da ANSN para medidores nucleares em aplicações industriais

image:image.image:title: Elaboração de Escopos Técnicos
image:image.image:caption: Desenvolvimento de escopos para contratação de investigação de contaminação e análises laboratoriais

image:image.image:title: Treinamentos em Radioproteção Industrial - Medidores Nucleares
image:image.image:caption: Treinamentos especializados para IOEs (Indivíduos Ocupacionalmente Expostos) à radiação

image:image.image:title: Comitês de Bacias
image:image.image:caption: Acompanhamento, verificação de atendimento legal e representação em comitês de bacias hidrográficas

image:image.image:title: Due Diligence Ambiental
image:image.image:caption: Verificação local e documental, elaboração de relatório de avaliação ambiental para transações

image:image.image:title: Gestão de Emissões Atmosféricas
image:image.image:caption: Determinação de parâmetros, frequência de análises e alinhamento com órgãos ambientais reguladores

image:image.image:title: Gestão de Resíduos Sólidos
image:image.image:caption: PGRS, CADRI, procedimentos, armazenamento, identificação e classificação de resíduos

image:image.image:title: Treinamento de Segurança do Trabalho
image:image.image:caption: Atendimento das exigências de treinamentos que constam das Normas Regulamentadoras (NRs)

image:image.image:title: Licenciamento Ambiental
image:image.image:caption: Solicitação e acompanhamento de licenças ambientais junto à CETESB e órgãos competentes

image:image.image:title: Avaliação de Análises Químicas
image:image.image:caption: Checagem sobre a validade das análises químicas com proposta para adequação de frequência

image:image.image:title: Monitoramento Hídrico
image:image.image:caption: Elaboração de procedimentos, parâmetros de monitoramento e treinamentos em qualidade hídrica

image:image.image:title: Consultoria Exato Logo - Occupational and Environmental Solutions
image:image.image:caption: Logo of Consultoria Exato, company specializing in EHS and Radiation Protection

image:image.image:title: Paulo Cassim - EHS Consultant with 28 years of experience
image:image.image:caption: Paulo Cassim, founder of Consultoria Exato, specialist in Occupational Safety, Environment and Radiation Protection

image:image.image:title: Flag of Brazil - Access Portuguese Version
image:image.image:caption: Language: Portuguese (Português)

image:image.image:title: Flag of USA - Access English Version
image:image.image:caption: Language: English

image:image.image:title: Occupational Safety Icon
image:image.image:caption: Icon representing Occupational Safety consulting services and compliance with regulatory standards

image:image.image:title: Environment Icon
image:image.image:caption: Icon representing Environmental Management and licensing services (CETESB)

image:image.image:title: Radiation Protection Icon
image:image.image:caption: Icon representing Radiation Protection Supervision services for nuclear meters in industries

image:image.image:title: Environmental Assessments
image:image.image:caption: On-site and documentary environmental assessment services by Consultoria Exato

image:image.image:title: Occupational Safety Audits
image:image.image:caption: Verification of legal compliance with regulatory standards and internal safety procedures

image:image.image:title: Environmental Accident Investigation
image:image.image:caption: On-site investigation of environmental accidents with root cause analysis and recommendations

image:image.image:title: Occupational Accident Investigation
image:image.image:caption: Reconstruction, evaluation, root cause analysis and action plan for workplace accidents

image:image.image:title: Confined Spaces - Regulation 33
image:image.image:caption: Procedures, training and audits related to confined spaces according to NR-33

image:image.image:title: Safety for Motorized Equipment
image:image.image:caption: Development of training and safety procedures for motorized equipment operation

image:image.image:title: Work at Height - NR-35 Fall Protection
image:image.image:caption: Consulting services for work at heights and fall protection according to regulation NR-35

image:image.image:title: Safety for Service Providers
image:image.image:caption: Development of procedures, admission criteria, periodic audits and training for service providers

image:image.image:title: Hazardous Energy Management - Lockout Tagout (LOTO)
image:image.image:caption: Lockout and management of hazardous energy for machines and equipment

image:image.image:title: Industrial Radiation Protection Supervision
image:image.image:caption: Compliance with ANSN regulations for nuclear meters in industrial applications

image:image.image:title: Development of Technical Scopes
image:image.image:caption: Development of scopes for contracting contamination investigation and laboratory analyses

image:image.image:title: Training in Industrial Radiation Protection - Nuclear Meters
image:image.image:caption: Specialized training for IOEs (Occupationally Exposed Individuals) to radiation

image:image.image:title: Basin Committees
image:image.image:caption: Monitoring, legal compliance verification and representation in watershed basin committees

image:image.image:title: Environmental Due Diligence
image:image.image:caption: On-site and documentary verification, preparation of environmental assessment report for transactions

image:image.image:title: Atmospheric Emissions Management
image:image.image:caption: Parameter determination, analysis frequency and alignment with regulatory environmental agencies

image:image.image:title: Solid Waste Management
image:image.image:caption: Waste management plan (PGRS), waste authorization (CADRI), procedures, storage, identification and classification

image:image.image:title: Occupational Safety Training
image:image.image:caption: Compliance with training requirements specified in regulatory standards (NRs)

image:image.image:title: Environmental Licensing
image:image.image:caption: Request and monitoring of environmental licenses with CETESB and competent authorities

image:image.image:title: Chemical Analysis Evaluation
image:image.image:caption: Review of chemical analysis validity with proposal for adequate analysis frequency adjustments

image:image.image:title: Water Monitoring
image:image.image:caption: Development of monitoring procedures, water quality parameters and training programs
